dailyPlans.title: Daily Warmup
dailyPlans.summary: A short warmup rotation for board vision and forcing-move habits.

dailyPlans.title: Daily Tactics Ladder
dailyPlans.summary: A lightweight tactics ladder that points into the pattern stages.

dailyPlans.title: Daily Practical Review
dailyPlans.summary: A practical review loop for planning and endgame technique.

dailyPlans.title: Daily Master Push
dailyPlans.summary: A late-stage daily hook for practical defense and integrated decision-making.

specialModes.title: Survival Mode
specialModes.subtitle: Sudden-death run climb
specialModes.summary: Clear escalating Road to GM checkpoints in one life and keep the run alive as the deck speeds up.

specialModes.title: Puzzle Rush
specialModes.subtitle: 3-minute mode
specialModes.summary: Sprint through a 3-minute tactical burst seeded from your current Road to GM stage.

specialModes.title: Endurance Mode
specialModes.subtitle: Long-form focus block
specialModes.summary: Hold accuracy across a long Road to GM rotation without dropping below the target score floor.

payload.bestScorePlaceholder: Best run: No endurance clear yet

specialModes.title: Blindfold League
specialModes.subtitle: Visualization circuit
specialModes.summary: Train board memory and move recall with hidden-board sequences layered onto the curriculum climb.

specialModes.title: Opening Duel
specialModes.subtitle: Prep showdown
specialModes.summary: Race through opening choices, punish off-book slips, and defend your prep under clock pressure.

specialModes.title: Weekly Stress Test
specialModes.subtitle: Rotating pressure check
specialModes.summary: A once-per-week gauntlet that remixes tactics, practical decisions, and endgame defense into one scorecard.

specialModes.title: Boss Battles
specialModes.subtitle: Graduation rematches
specialModes.summary: Replay Road to GM graduation bosses as a premium gauntlet with no filler rounds between fights.

specialModes.title: Calculation Overdrive
specialModes.subtitle: Content-pack bonus slot
specialModes.summary: An extra pack-defined challenge slot for high-pressure calculation bursts beyond the base seven modes.

chapters.title: Chapter 1: Foundations
chapters.subtitle: Board orientation and forcing-move habits that power everything else.
chapters.description: The opening chapter scaffolds vision, coordinates, and forcing-move awareness so later tactical and strategic work has a clean base.

stages.title: Stage 1: Board Vision
stages.subtitle: Learn to scan the board quickly, name what matters, and avoid one-move misses.
stages.description: 18 core mini-games focused on coordinates, board scan habits, piece recognition, and basic safety checks.

groups.title: Board Scan
groups.summary: Sweep ranks, files, and diagonals before you move.

groups.title: Coordinate Echo
groups.summary: Repeat square naming until board orientation becomes automatic.

groups.title: Piece Recognition
groups.summary: Spot attackers, defenders, and loose pieces immediately.

groups.title: Safety Checks
groups.summary: Check scans, capture scans, and threat scans anchor every move.

graduation.title: Graduation: Board Vision Gate
graduation.summary: Finish the stage with a short boss gate that ties the scan loop together.

chapters.title: Chapter 2: Pattern To Plan
chapters.subtitle: Move from tactical motifs into disciplined opening and transition play.
chapters.description: This chapter bridges tactical recognition into opening discipline and cleaner middlegame handoffs.
